finding_id.description: Unique identifier for this compliance finding

rule_id.description: The doctrine compliance rule that was violated (e.g., DCR-01)

library_id.description: Library where the violation was detected

artifact_path.description: Relative path to the non-compliant artifact

message.description: Human-readable description of the compliance violation

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was detected

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was resolved

run_id.description: Maintenance run that produced this finding

remediation_hint.description: Suggested action to resolve the finding
